notes: Used both literally for a ship sinking and figuratively in the phrase 'Schiffbruch erleiden' (to fail, to come to grief).

sentences.german: Das Schiff erlitt Schiffbruch und sank innerhalb weniger Stunden.
sentences.english: The ship was wrecked and sank within a few hours.

sentences.german: Seine Pläne erlitten Schiffbruch, weil er zu wenig Geld hatte.
sentences.english: His plans came to grief because he had too little money.
